stemHtml: Which one of the following statements below best describes the Centre of Gravity (CG) of an aircraft?

options.a: The CG is the point at which the sum of the balance arms is nil.
options.b: The CG is the point at which the total weight is assumed to be concentrated.
options.c: The CG is the point at which the sum of the values of the moments is NOT zero.
options.d: The CG is the point at which the total weight is applied and acts in the longitudinal direction.
